description: A production line was down for 2 hours due to a mechanical failure. A supervisor must log this event for OEE (Overall Equipment Effectiveness) tracking.

nodes.task_description: Select the piece of equipment that failed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the equipment asset ID.

nodes.task_description: Create a new downtime log entry, entering the start and end times of the outage.
Assign a reason code for the downtime (e.g., 'Mechanical Failure') from a predefined list.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly categorizes the downtime event, which will now be reflected in the OEE calculation.
